MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUCALON, ANTONIO COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-24-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

DEPT 1/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY ARNOLD EVJE PRESENT WITH PLTF. ATNY JAMES JOHNSON PRESENT WITH DEFT. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAHANY, HAL JR. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3232 GOUGH STREET #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $3,112.00 RENT, $700.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,007.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-02-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DFT TENDERS SUM OF $1478 TO PLTF REPRESENTING 7/1 RENTAL INSTALL & $700 ATNYS FEES, PLTF WILL POSTPONE EVICT UNTIL 7/31/96. IF BAL OF PAST DUE RENTS/DMGS OF $3112 & COSTS OF $195 PAID ON/BEFORE 7/31, PLTF WILL RESTORE TENANCY. ANY PER SONAL PROPTY LEFT AFTER 7/31 DEEMED ABANDONED. SEE JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
